scripts.test: node --test scripts/desktop-icon-contract.test.mjs && pnpm run test:desktop-url-disposition && pnpm run test:desktop-renderer-recovery && pnpm run test:desktop-remote-debugging-guard && pnpm run test:desktop-hud-build-reload && pnpm run test:desktop-csp-watchdog && pnpm run test:desktop-auth-security && pnpm run test:desktop-window-state && pnpm run test:desktop-tray-png && pnpm run test:system-b-tokens && node --test scripts/desktop-shell-contract.test.mjs && node --test scripts/desktop-tray-contract.test.mjs && node --test scripts/launch-electron.test.mjs && node --test scripts/generate-dmg-background.test.mjs && node --test ../../scripts/desktop-release-guard.test.mjs && node --test ../../scripts/desktop-installed-apps-audit.test.mjs
